# Dealer Suite 360
> Dealer Suite 360 (dealersuite360.com) is the all-in-one dealership operating system for Canadian RV dealers.

Dealer Suite 360 provides a comprehensive SaaS platform combining AI-powered warranty claims processing with a full suite of dealership revenue services including F&I, financing, parts management, a dealer-to-dealer network marketplace, and monthly live auctions open to the public.

## Who We Serve
- Canadian RV dealerships (primary audience)
- RV dealers looking to outsource warranty claims processing
- Dealers seeking to grow revenue through F&I, financing, and parts services
- Dealers wanting to buy or sell RV inventory through a verified network marketplace
- General public looking to purchase RVs at wholesale prices through live auctions

## Core Services

### Claims Processing (Live — Module 1)
- A-Z Warranty Claims Processing: DAF (Dealer Authorization Form), PDI (Pre-Delivery Inspection), Warranty, Extended Warranty, Insurance
- Supported manufacturers: Jayco, Forest River, Heartland, Columbia NW, Keystone, Midwest Auto
- Covers all RV types: Travel Trailer, Fifth Wheel, Class A, Class C, Van Camper, Small Trailer, Pop Up, Toy Hauler, Truck Camper, Destination Trailer
- AI-powered FRC code lookup, photo quality scoring, and claim readiness scoring
- Patent-pending technology platform

### Financial Services (Q2 2026)
- Financing Services: lender integration, approval optimization, bilingual compliance
- F&I (Finance & Insurance) Outsourcing: loan origination, GAP insurance, extended warranty sales
- Warranty & Extended Service Plans: OEM and aftermarket plan management

### Revenue Growth Services (Q3 2026)
- Digital Marketing & Lead Generation
- Parts & Accessories Management
- Service Department Support
- Customer Experience Technology
- Trade-In & Consignment Programs

### Marketplace & Auctions (Q3–Q4 2026)
- Network Marketplace: dealer-to-dealer RV inventory listings, 24/7 access, $250 flat commission per unit sold, Dealer Suite 360 acts as escrow
- Live Auctions: monthly public auctions running 48 hours, bidder account required, $250 refundable deposit per unit bid (deducted from purchase price if won, returned if lost)

### Consumer Direct Services (Q4 2026)
- Roadside Assistance
- Extended Warranty
- RV Protection Packages

## Pricing
- Plan A: $349/month — core claims processing subscription
- Plan B: $749/month — professional tier with expanded services
- Marketplace Membership: $499/year
- Live Auction Access: $99/month or $899/year
- Network Marketplace Commission: $250 flat fee per completed unit sale
- Live Auction Bidder Deposit: $250 per unit bid (fully refundable if not won)
- Claim processing fees: available by contract and through dealer portal

## Technology
- AI-powered FRC Lookup Engine for manufacturer-specific repair codes
- Photo Quality Gatekeeper for claim photo analysis
- Claim Readiness Score (0–100% confidence before submission)
- Document Scanner with OCR for correspondence
- Denial Prediction engine based on historical claim patterns
- Invoice Matcher for parts to claim lines
- AI F&I Presenter (Tavus/D-ID video avatar)
- Bilingual platform: English and French (Canadian)

## Business Model
- Two-sided SaaS platform: dealers subscribe, operator team delivers services
- Revenue: monthly subscriptions + per-claim fees + marketplace commissions + auction fees + F&I referral fees + financing origination fees
- Target market: ~7,400 RV dealerships across North America

## Brand Architecture
- Dealer Suite 360 (dealersuite360.com) — one unified brand serving the Canadian market and expanding across North America

## Contact
- Phone: 888-443-2204
- Website: https://dealersuite360.com
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Languages: English, French
